message:
✨ sidebar search, wider guide names, top bar hover fix

- Add search field in sidebar to filter groups/favorites
- Widen guide channel name column from 140px to 200px, allow 2-line wrap
- Fix top bar disappearing on hover: track mouse enter/exit, never fade while inside
- Sidebar search filters groups and favorites in real-time

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
